title: Better than clouds
description: a vanilla friendly modpack with new animations new particles and much more!
body:
this is a vanilla friendly modpack with new animations new particles a new panorama and fixes some issues in minecraft and adds features that should have been in minecraft like: now u can craft saddles/wardens now spawn valuble loot 

and now glow squids actually glow!

this modpack aims to be more quality of life than adding new content 

Note: This modpack is OUTDATED, There will be a 2.0 version of this one stay tuned!
